fields.label: Background color
fields.description: Choose a color to use as the background.

fields.label: Solutions
fields.description: Enter the correct solution(s) for this label. You can enter multiple solutions separated by a forward slash(/). If your solution is supposed to contain a forward slash, prepend it with a backslash (\/).

fields.label: Distractors
fields.description: Enter wrong solution(s) for this label. You can enter multiple solutions separated by a forward slash(/). If your solution is supposed to contain a forward slash, prepend it with a backslash (\/).

fields.label: Hint
fields.description: Optionally, enter a hint for this label to assist the user with finding the correct answer.

fields.label: Hotspot anchor position
fields.description: Select the position of the hotspot for small screens in relation to the input field.

semantics.label: Background image
semantics.description: Select the image to be used as background.

fields.label: Define custom feedback for any score range
fields.description: Click the "Add range" button to add as many ranges as you need. Example: 0-20% Bad score, 21-91% Average Score, 91-100% Great Score!

fields.label: Hotspot display mode
fields.description: On small screens, input fields will not be shown on the image directly but in popups that are triggered by hotspots. You can choose to let the content type decide based on the screen size or always use hotspots.

fields.label: Case sensitive
fields.description: Makes sure the user input has to be exactly the same as the answer.

fields.label: Label X of Y
fields.description: @current and @total are placeholders and will be replaced by the respective values.

fields.label: Result screen score header
fields.description: @score and @total are placeholders and will be replaced by the respective values.

fields.label: Assistive technology description for "Check" button
fields.default: Check the answers. The responses will be marked as correct, incorrect, or unanswered.

fields.label: Assistive technology description for "Show solution" button
fields.default: Show the solution. The task will be marked with its correct solution.

fields.label: Assistive technology description for "Retry" button
fields.default: Retry the task. Reset all responses and start the task over again.

fields.label: Your result
fields.description: @score will be replaced by the number of points. @total will be replaced by the maximum possible points.

fields.label: Show hint
fields.description: @current is a placeholder and will be replaced by the respective value.

fields.label: Label X of Y
fields.description: @current and @total are placeholders and will be replaced by the respective values.

fields.label: Hotspot X of Y
fields.description: @current and @total are placeholders and will be replaced by the respective values.
fields.default: Hotspot @current of @total. Press Enter to open to edit input field.

fields.label: CorrectAnswer
fields.description: @solution is a placeholder and will be replaced by the respective value.

fields.label: Instruction to fill in the labels
fields.default: Fill in the labels on the image.
